creator: vivek@khera.org
text:
Not sure exactly what breaks because of this...  but I guess we can
apply them.  I really don't see the point, though.

On Tue, Nov 4, 2008 at 12:10 AM, Edwin Groothuis <edwin@freebsd.org> wrote:
